title: Add User model with passwordHash field and password hashing utility
description: Create a User domain model (src/models/user.ts) with id, email, passwordHash, and createdAt fields. Create a password hashing utility (src/utils/password.ts) exporting hashPassword and verifyPassword functions using bcrypt-equivalent secure hashing with embedded salt. Co-located unit tests cover: hash output varies each call, verification succeeds for correct password, verification fails for wrong password, edge cases (empty string, long password, special characters).
existing_patterns: src/models/notification.ts - TypeScript interface pattern for domain models with id, email, createdAt fields
src/auth/auth-service.ts - PBKDF2 password hashing (25000 iterations, sha256, 512 bits) — considered bcrypt-equivalent per task
src/auth/user-store.ts - User interface with passwordHash field, different hashing approach (SHA-256) for reference
src/utils/*.test.ts - co-located vitest test files using describe/it pattern
